title: Renford Tomlinson
description: Best Shaderpack for Youtube Videos / Thumbnails / Horror Content
body:
![text saying "renford tomlinson"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66040ede3b262d3ed5e1058b51e0bf6ce78dc3c5.png)

This is a PEAK shaderpack for the following

1. Horror Videos
2. Thumbnails
3. Horror Modpacks
4. Survival Modpacks
5. Building Trees
6. Sleeping
7. Placing signs that say "Christmas"

Some of my favorite features

- Enable Color Controls | Does absolutely nothing 
- Horror Mode Override | Makes everything spooky
- Complete Darkness
- Water | c'mon bro the water looks so freaking cool

Thats about it, Enjoy some shaderpack screenshots i took:

![A Red Sunset using the Horror Preset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e410e2adeee7f349fc6f4d10b740c3ffa0cf737_0.webp)

![A Sunset depicting the Realism Preset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e86cf8947754ac538cb67a13efd995f606eb89cd_0.webp)

![Complete darkness in the minecraft world in a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6efc4edc8e1c3fdeef6556932bb8e4e8157da3c_0.webp)
